quests.title: Move Your Body
quests.desc: Do at least 20 minutes of physical activity today.

quests.title: Eat Well Once
quests.desc: Have one genuinely nutritious, proper meal today.

quests.title: Early Rise
quests.desc: Wake up at least 30 minutes earlier than usual.

quests.title: Learn Something New
quests.desc: Read or study something outside your comfort zone for 15 minutes.

quests.title: Solve a Problem
quests.desc: Identify one problem you have been avoiding and think it through properly.

quests.title: Reflect in Writing
quests.desc: Write down three things you observed or learnt today.

quests.title: Break Your Routine
quests.desc: Change one small but deliberate thing about your daily routine.

quests.title: Respond, Don't React
quests.desc: When something unexpected happens today, pause and respond calmly.

quests.title: Try a New Approach
quests.desc: Do a familiar task in a completely different way than usual.

quests.title: Sleep on Time
quests.desc: Get into bed before midnight and aim for at least 7 hours of sleep.

quests.title: Finish What You Started
quests.desc: Push through one task you felt like quitting today.

quests.title: No Complaints
quests.desc: Go the entire day without complaining about anything, even mentally.

quests.title: Meaningful Conversation
quests.desc: Have one genuine, focused conversation with another person today.

quests.title: Reconnect
quests.desc: Reach out to someone in your network you haven't spoken to in a while.

quests.title: Give Genuine Praise
quests.desc: Give someone a sincere, specific compliment or word of appreciation today.
